title: elsholtzia splendens var. hallasanensis
intro: Elsholtzia splendens var. hallasanensis, also known as Hallasan Elsholtzia, is a plant species native to the Korean Peninsula, specifically on the highest peak of Jeju Island, Hallasan. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Hallasan Elsholtzia include reducing fever, relieving cough and cold symptoms, and improving digestion. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used in traditional Korean medicine to treat various ailments.
